import React, { useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { updateSeo } from '../../utils/seoHelper'; import styles from './Services.module.css'; import { FaLaptopCode, FaMobileAlt, FaDatabase, FaCloud, FaSearch, FaCogs } from 'react-icons/fa'; function Services() { const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { updateSeo({ title: 'Our Services | Kognivex IT Solutions', description: 'From custom web development to SaaS architecture and cloud transformation, explore our elite engineering services.', }); }, []); const services = [ { icon: , title: "Custom Web Applications", desc: "High-performance, scalable web platforms built with modern architectures like React and Node.js." }, { icon: , title: "Mobile App Development", desc: "Native and cross-platform mobile solutions designed for speed, security, and exceptional UX." }, { icon: , title: "SaaS Architecture", desc: "End-to-end multi-tenant platform engineering focused on scalability, billing, and global delivery." }, { icon: , title: "Enterprise Systems", desc: "Complex back-office automation, ERP integrations, and data-driven management tools." }, { icon: , title: "Cloud & DevOps", desc: "AWS/Azure infrastructure management, CI/CD pipelines, and zero-downtime deployment strategies." }, { icon: , title: "Product Strategy", desc: "Technical consulting to align your product roadmap with market demands and scalable engineering." } ]; return (
{/* HERO */}

Specialized Engineering

We provide elite software development services designed to solve complex business challenges and drive scalable growth.

{/* SERVICES GRID */}

Our Core Capabilities

{services.map((service, index) => (
{service.icon}

{service.title}

{service.desc}

))}
{/* PROCESS SECTION */}

How We Deliver Excellence

1

Discovery

We deep-dive into your business goals and technical requirements.

2

Architecture

Our engineers design a scalable, secure, and future-proof blueprint.

3

Development

Agile execution with continuous feedback and quality assurance.

4

Deployment

Seamless transition to production with ongoing support.

{/* TECHNOLOGY STACK */}

Our Technology Stack

React / Next.js Node.js / Express Python / Django PostgreSQL / MongoDB AWS / Azure Docker / Kubernetes TypeScript
{/* CTA */}

Accelerate Your Roadmap

Don't let technical debt hold your business back. Let's build your next big thing together.

); } export default Services;
